fallbackReason: Task subagent bun-eval parsing error; direct review per AGENTS.md guidance
summary: Feature adds CockpitSceneProofPanel as a validation affordance for headed/manual cockpit scene proof. The component exposes all significant scene state values as DOM-queryable data-proof-* attributes, enabling headed browser validators to prove live NPC population and backend-to-scene propagation for VAL-THREE-002 and VAL-THREE-003. Includes a collapsible UI, 16 comprehensive tests, and a reusable proof procedure document in .factory/library/headed-cockpit-proof.md.

observations: data-proof-* attributes are well-chosen for machine-queryable DOM validation
Panel correctly uses pointer-events-auto to remain interactive within a pointer-events-none scene container
Expand/collapse toggle preserves attributes on the root regardless of expansion state
NPC names use a join(',') for the data attribute and render individual li elements in expanded view
Component follows the project's design system patterns (zinc-500 labels, dark card styling)
The SceneProofSnapshot interface cleanly separates validation data from rendering concerns

sharedStateObservations.observation: The headed-cockpit-proof.md library doc provides a step-by-step browser validation procedure that could be useful for future validators
sharedStateObservations.recommendation: Already applied by the worker — no action needed
